$schema_note: RDR-007 §2 golden conformance fixture — the task-classification precedence. HOST-SCOPED (TS only): implemented by classifyTask (types.ts). The Python eval host (run_arm) does NOT route backends and has no counterpart, so this fixture is consumed by vitest only. It is normative-if-adopted: any future host that classifies dispatch calls (e.g. nexus pick_dispatcher_for) MUST match this table. See the S2 reconciliation in agent-dispatch-contract.md.
rule: Precedence top-to-bottom (RDR-007 Decision §2): 1) opts.json_schema present -> schemaSynth; 2) opts present -> agenticLoop; 3) modality embedding -> embed / rerank -> rerank; 4) otherwise -> chat.
